User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block AI training crawlers
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

# Allow AI search/retrieval bots
User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://me.shashanksv.com/sitemap.xml
